---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for earlygod.ai
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?
A clear description of the problem you're trying to solve, or the feature you wish existed.

## Proposed solution
What you think the feature should do.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you considered and why you didn't pick them.

## Are you willing to contribute this?
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] I can help test
- [ ] I'm just suggesting it

---

**Note:** This is a reference implementation and is not actively maintained. The easiest way to get a feature shipped is to fork the repo and build it yourself. PRs are welcome but may not be reviewed promptly.
